text:
is a doujinshi for Neon Genesis Evangelion by Ikuto Yamashita's doujinshi circle BLUE AND PURPLE. 

Overview

It features setting materials, and illustrations done by Ikuto Yamashita for Neon Genesis Evangelion, these illustrations were later republished for the Sore o Nasumono: Neon Genesis Evangelion Concept Design Works book. The doujinshi got s revised version in 1997 with more content. https://aucview.aucfan.com/yahoo/b1035408488/
